# UI component inventory for project (2026-03-06 18:27Z)

_**User**_

In the project at /Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury, I need a comprehensive inventory of all UI components. 

1. List ALL component files in apps/web/components/ and apps/web/app/components/ - read each one and note:
   - What it renders (buttons, inputs, modals, cards, etc.)
   - How styling is done (inline Tailwind classes, etc.)
   - How complex the component is
   - Whether it has custom interactive behavior

2. Also check apps/web/app/ for any page-level components that have significant UI

3. Check if there's any existing component library or design system pattern

Return a detailed inventory with file paths, component names, what HTML elements/patterns they use, and the approximate line count for each.

Here’s the UI component inventory:

---

# UI Component Inventory – Lesury

## 1. `apps/web/app/components/` (4 files)

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `Button.tsx` | Button | Link or button, variants: primary, secondary, outline | Tailwind inline, hex colors (#141413, #FAF9F5, #F0EFEA, #E8E6DC, #D97757) | Low | onClick, href | ~47 |
| `Header.tsx` | Header | Header, logo (Image), nav link | Tailwind inline, hex colors | Low | Link hover | ~35 |
| `AnimatedHero.tsx` | AnimatedHero | TV/monitor mockup, floating phones, connection dots | Tailwind + Framer Motion (y, opacity) | Medium | Framer Motion animations | ~66 |
| `GameCard.tsx` | GameCard | Card with icon/emoji, title, description, metadata, “Coming Soon” badge | Tailwind + Framer Motion (staggered entrance) | Medium | Hover overlay, Link | ~98 |

---

## 2. `apps/web/components/` (18 files)

### Layout

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `layout/GameLayout.tsx` | GameLayout | Wrapper with back button | Tailwind, theme (light/dark) | Low | Back button navigation | ~54 |

### Room

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `room/RoomHost.tsx` | RoomHost | Loading spinner, QR canvas, room code, copy buttons, player list, Start button | Tailwind, hex colors | High | PartySocket, QRCode, clipboard, start game | ~265 |
| `room/RoomPlayer.tsx` | RoomPlayer | Name input, room code input, Join button, waiting state, loading spinner | Tailwind | High | PartySocket, form inputs, join flow | ~188 |

### Timeline

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `games/timeline/EventCard.tsx` | EventCard | Card with image, title, category badge, year | Tailwind + inline style for category color | Medium | None (presentational) | ~111 |
| `games/timeline/ControlPad.tsx` | ControlPad | Left/right arrows, center place button | Tailwind, Framer Motion (whileTap) | Low | onClick handlers | ~74 |
| `games/timeline/ResultOverlay.tsx` | ResultOverlay | Full-screen overlay with ✓/✗ | Tailwind, Framer Motion (AnimatePresence) | Low | Auto-dismiss timer | ~54 |
| `games/timeline/TimelinePlayer.tsx` | TimelinePlayer | Game over, waiting, active turn (event info + ControlPad), result overlay | Tailwind, Framer Motion | High | Socket, move/place, overlays | ~227 |
| `games/timeline/TimelineHost.tsx` | TimelineHost | Header, horizontal timeline, EventCards, slots, scores, footer | Tailwind, Framer Motion (AnimatePresence, layout), styled-jsx for scrollbar | High | Auto-scroll, socket | ~298 |

### Demo

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `games/demo/DemoHost.tsx` | DemoHost | Counter display, +/- buttons, player count | Tailwind | Low | Socket increment/decrement | ~79 |
| `games/demo/DemoPlayer.tsx` | DemoPlayer | Counter display, +/- buttons | Tailwind | Low | Socket increment/decrement | ~70 |

### Guessio

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `games/guessio/GuessioHost.tsx` | GuessioHost | Waiting room, scoreboard, game state, board preview, Next Turn | Tailwind, some gray-* | Medium | Socket, start/next turn | ~119 |
| `games/guessio/GuessioPlayer.tsx` | GuessioPlayer | Waiting, word options + bet buttons, Success/Failure | Tailwind, dark theme | Medium | Socket, word/bet selection, result reporting | ~122 |

### Mindshot

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|
| `games/mindshot/MindshotHost.tsx` | MindshotHost | Lobby (QR, players, HP slider, zone speed), game over, hex grid SVG, player tokens, phase banner | Tailwind, SVG, inline styles | Very high | Socket, QR, kick, start, frame advance | ~365 |
| `games/mindshot/MindshotPlayer.tsx` | MindshotPlayer | DirectionPicker (hex grid), lobby, eliminated, game over, resolving, planning | Tailwind, inline styles for accent | High | Socket, direction selection, submit plan | ~345 |

### The Line

| File | Component | Renders | Styling | Complexity | Interactive | Lines |
|------|-----------|---------|---------|------------|-------------|-------|

| `games/the-line/TheLinePlayer.tsx` | TheLinePlayer | Kicked, setup, game over, waiting, revealing, placing (event + arrows + place) | Tailwind, Framer Motion | High | Socket, move/place, kicked listener | ~314 |

| File | Significant UI | Notes |

| `page.tsx` | Hero, “How It Works” (3 cards), footer | Uses Header, Button, GameCard, AnimatedHero; device detection |

| `games/timeline/page.tsx` | Device-aware host/join cards, “How to Play” | Uses Header, Button |
| `games/the-line/page.tsx` | Two-column layout, animated line hero, step list with inline SVG icons | Uses Header; custom Link buttons (not Button) |
| `join/page.tsx` | Wraps RoomPlayer; Suspense fallback spinner | Minimal |
| `host/page.tsx` | Wraps RoomHost; Suspense fallback | Minimal |
| `layout.tsx` | Root layout, Inter font, GA scripts | No UI components |

---

## 4. Design system and patterns

### Design tokens (`globals.css`)

- **Colors:** `--background` (#faf9f5), `--background-secondary` (#f0efea), `--background-tertiary` (#e8e6dc), `--foreground` (#141413), `--foreground-secondary` (#b0aea5), `--accent` (#d97757), `--accent-blue`, `--accent-green`
- **Tailwind:** `@theme inline` maps `--color-background`, `--color-foreground`, `--font-sans`
- **Usage:** Most components use hex values (`#141413`, `#FAF9F5`, `#D97757`, etc.) instead of CSS variables

### Component library

- No external UI library (no Radix, shadcn, MUI, etc.)
- One shared primitive: `Button` in `app/components/Button.tsx`
- `GameLayout` used for game wrappers (back button, theme)

### Styling approach

- Tailwind utility classes
- Hex colors in class names (e.g. `bg-[#141413]`, `text-[#D97757]`)
- Some inline `style` for dynamic values (category colors, progress bars)
- Framer Motion for animations
- `styled-jsx` in TimelineHost and TheLineHost for scrollbar hiding

### Recurring patterns

- **Cards:** `rounded-2xl`/`rounded-3xl`, `shadow-md`/`shadow-lg`, `border border-[#E8E6DC]`
- **Buttons:** `rounded-xl`/`rounded-2xl`, `font-bold`, `hover:`, `active:scale-95`
- **Accent:** `#D97757` (terracotta) for primary actions
- **Backgrounds:** `#FAF9F5`, `#F0EFEA`, `#2A2A2A` (dark)
- **Inputs:** `bg-[#F0EFEA]`, `focus:border-[#D97757]`, `focus:ring-[#D97757]/20`

---
